inputs.label: Wall Length
inputs.businessContext: The horizontal length of the wall in meters.

inputs.label: Wall Height
inputs.businessContext: The height of the wall from base to top in meters.

inputs.label: Number of Leaves
inputs.businessContext: The thickness of the wall in terms of brick leaves (1 for half-brick, 2 for full brick, etc.).

inputs.label: Brick Length
inputs.businessContext: Standard brick length (e.g., 215mm for UK format).

inputs.label: Brick Height
inputs.businessContext: Standard brick height (e.g., 65mm for UK format).

inputs.label: Mortar Joint Thickness
inputs.businessContext: Typical mortar joint thickness between bricks (e.g., 10mm).

inputs.label: Wastage Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Allowance for cutting and breakage as a percentage (e.g., 5% => extra 5%).
